analysis_result: 29 genes upregulated in MPNST-G1 with logFC > 1 AND FDR < 0.05 (from Supplementary Data 3)
discrepancy_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- Supplementary Data 3 (MOESM6): MPNST-G1 DEG list, 54 upregulated and 70 downregulated genes (124 total rows with Symbol/Clust_G1_Mean/logFCvsOther/pVal/FDR).

B. COHORT
- MPNST-G1 vs Other methylation subgroups (bulk RNA-seq n = 49).
- Per Fig 3b legend: 'Heatmap of the differentially expressed genes between the methylation subgroups (logFC > 1, FDR corrected p-value < 0.05)'.

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Threshold applied per strict reading of Fig 3b legend: logFC > 1 AND FDR < 0.05.
- With |logFC| > 1 AND FDR < 0.05 (combining up/down): 76 genes.
- With logFC > 1 AND FDR < 0.05 (upregulated only): 29 genes.
- With logFC < -1 AND FDR < 0.05 (downregulated only): 47 genes.

D. COMPUTATION
- Reported: ~40 (approximate count likely from visual inspection of Fig 3b heatmap rows).
- Model strict (logFC > 1): 29 genes.
- Relative difference: |40 - 29| / 40 = 27.5%.

E. RESULT
- DISCREPANT (>10% relative).
- Magnitude MAJOR (>20% relative).

F. ROOT CAUSE
- The paper legend specifies 'logFC > 1, FDR < 0.05' without explicit directionality, which the model interpreted strictly as one-sided (upregulated only). The heatmap in Fig 3b likely shows ~40 rows that include additional genes from the display (e.g., visually annotated row labels), or the '~40' reported figure is an approximate eyeballed count of the heatmap. Taking 'logFC > 1' literally as an absolute-value threshold yields 76 genes. Only the strict one-directional interpretation yields 29.
- The ambiguity is in interpreting whether 'logFC > 1' in the figure legend means a one-sided (upregulated only) threshold or a two-sided |logFC| > 1. Neither strict interpretation exactly matches '~40'.
- The most likely explanation is that the '~40' reported value represents approximately the number of visible labeled gene rows in the Fig 3b heatmap, not the exact threshold-based count.
proposed_fix: Clarify whether '~40 genes' refers to a visual count of labeled heatmap rows in Fig 3b or strict threshold application; the supplementary data supports either 29 (upregulated strict) or 76 (two-sided |logFC|>1). The reported '~40' appears to be an approximate visual count from the figure, not an exact threshold result. Update the reported answer to state the supplementary-data-derived count under the interpretation used.
